== Notes for [[Item:Q101118|Q101118]] ==

*[http://www.geni.com/people/Jacob-ben-Abba-Mari-ben-Simson-Anatoli/6000000020150242929 '''Jacob Mari ben Simson Anatoli] Her father.

*[http://www.geni.com/people/Don-Avraham-el-Alfaquin-HaKohen/6000000000348876565 '''Don Avraham el Alfaquin HaKohen] Her husband.

----

https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/stamboom-haverbus/I24900915.php

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9FFD5F1EFBBFA9822EF79916CE7B5
geni:6000000000348876558

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
